evals.prompt: Run a quick audit on paper.tex for a NeurIPS submission and tell me what blocks submission versus what is only a quality improvement.
evals.expected_output: Route to quick-audit, keep blockers first, and produce a compact readiness report rather than a full reviewer-style issue bundle.

assertions.description: quick audit does not drift into deep-review report format

evals.prompt: Review this manuscript like a real conference reviewer. I care more about the biggest validity threats than about grammar. Give me a structured revision roadmap and point me to the generated artifact files.
evals.expected_output: Route to deep-review, produce a deep-review report, surface artifact paths, and emphasize major/moderate/minor findings plus a revision roadmap.

evals.prompt: Deep-review this paper and tell me whether the abstract and conclusion claims actually match the evidence in the experiments. I want quote-backed findings with lane/source metadata.
evals.expected_output: Use a claims-vs-evidence framing, highlight quote-backed findings, and surface structured reviewer metadata rather than a simple checklist dump.

evals.prompt: Review this methods-heavy paper and check for notation drift, equation-to-text mismatch, and numbers that do not reconcile between the table and appendix. Show section anchors.
evals.expected_output: Emphasize notation and numeric consistency, not just generic methodology commentary, and include section anchoring.

evals.prompt: Gate this IEEE paper and separate true submission blockers from advisory pseudocode recommendations like line numbers or shorter comments.
evals.expected_output: Return PASS or FAIL and clearly distinguish blockers from recommendations.

assertions.description: gate output stays in gate format

evals.prompt: Re-audit this revision against my previous report and tell me which root-cause issues are fully fixed, partially fixed, still open, or newly introduced.
evals.expected_output: Use re-audit language with issue-level status classification, not a fresh audit only.

evals.prompt: Run a deep review with literature grounding and tell me if the novelty claim is actually defended against the closest prior work.
evals.expected_output: Use prior-art and novelty grounding logic, not just missing-reference detection.

evals.prompt: Polish this paper only if the precheck says there are no blockers that would make polishing premature.
evals.expected_output: Route to polish mode, evaluate safety first, and stop when blockers exist.

assertions.description: polish flow does not drift into deep-review report output

evals.prompt: Gate this submission with an editor-in-chief screening first. Tell me if a busy top-venue EIC would desk-reject this paper based on the title, abstract, and introduction pitch quality alone.
evals.expected_output: Run gate mode with EIC screening pass. Evaluate pitch quality, venue fit, fatal flaws, and presentation baseline before the detailed checklist.

evals.prompt: Deep-review this qualitative research paper. Pay special attention to whether the coding process is transparent, whether data saturation is discussed, and whether there is adequate researcher reflexivity. Also check the theoretical contribution depth.
evals.expected_output: Route to deep-review and apply qualitative methodology checks (B6-B10) plus theory contribution assessment (A5-A7). Flag missing SRQR elements.

evals.prompt: Deep-review this paper using the Academic Pre-Review Committee (Editor -> Theory -> Literature -> Methodology -> Logic). Be harsh, quote-backed, and point me to the committee artifacts in the deep-review workspace.
evals.expected_output: Run deep-review with committee routing, produce committee artifacts, and embed a committee section in the deep-review report when available.

evals.prompt: Deep-review this paper but focus ONLY on methodology transparency (SRQR). I want MUST-FIX vs SHOULD-FIX items and quote-backed findings. Use --focus methodology if needed.
evals.expected_output: Route to deep-review and produce a methodology-focused issue bundle plus methodology committee artifacts with MUST-FIX vs SHOULD-FIX separation and SRQR deltas.

evals.prompt: Deep-review this paper but focus ONLY on theory contribution. Give me exactly 3 fatal theory holes with quote+location, plus 2-4 concrete moves to fix. Use --focus theory if needed.
evals.expected_output: Route to deep-review and produce a theory-focused issue bundle plus theory committee artifacts with 3 fatal theory holes and concrete fixes.

assertions.pattern: (focus|Focus|theory|Theory Contribution Review|3 Fatal Theory Holes|Fatal Theory Holes)

evals.prompt: Please review this manuscript as an SCI journal reviewer. Write a concise academic-English review report with Summary, Major Issues, Minor Issues, and Recommendation.
evals.expected_output: Route to deep-review but make the peer-review artifact the primary view in the combined summary while still producing the technical review bundle.

assertions.description: internal schema field hidden in reviewer-facing report

evals.prompt: Act as a journal peer reviewer. I want a professional review report, not the raw audit schema. Keep it evidence-backed and point to the relevant section when you critique the paper.
evals.expected_output: Produce reviewer prose with section-aware issue descriptions while avoiding raw internal metadata leakage.

assertions.pattern: (In abstract|In introduction|In methods|In results|In discussion|In appendix)

evals.prompt: My deadline is in three days. Run a quick pre-submission mechanical check and flag em-dashes, AI-tone vocabulary, abstract result gaps, and LaTeX hygiene separately from deeper reviewer concerns.
evals.expected_output: Route to quick-audit and surface the PRESUBMISSION mechanical layer with script provenance, without switching to a new public pre-submission mode.

evals.prompt: Gate this paper before IEEE submission. Do not fail it just for AI-tone wording or em-dash cleanup, but show those advisory findings if they exist.
evals.expected_output: Run gate mode, keep PASS/FAIL calibrated to Critical blockers and failed checklist items, and show Major PRESUBMISSION findings as advisory.

assertions.description: mechanical findings are visible when present

evals.prompt: Deep-review this paper with focus ONLY on methodology. Do not let grammar, formatting, or pre-submission mechanical checks pollute the final methodology issue bundle.
evals.expected_output: Use deep-review --focus methodology, keep PRESUBMISSION in Phase 0 context only, and exclude pre_submission_readiness from the focused final issue bundle.

assertions.description: focused bundle not polluted by pre-submission lane

evals.prompt: Deep-review this paper and use the claim-evidence map to separate unsupported headline claims, citation-support-needed claims, and table-backed result claims.
evals.expected_output: Route to deep-review, preserve claim-evidence map terminology, and distinguish unsupported claims from citation metadata and table-backed metric evidence.

assertions.description: citation support is not collapsed into metadata existence
